The importance of data prep:

"Quality of the data is one of the most important factors that determine the accuracy"

Garabage in, Garbage out

DATA PREPROCESSING:
1 - General Cleaning:
    - Organizing
    - Tidying up the text
    - Remove anything that can throw an error

2 - Removing noise from the dataset:
    - Removign aspects in the data that are not adding any value

3 - Getting the data in the right format for the ML Alogrithm
